# mrclean test fixture — synthetic high-entropy non-secret
# Source: npm package-lock.json integrity field format — sha512- prefix + base64
# Negative: npm integrity hash shape (sha512- prefix) is explicitly allowlisted in Layer 2
# License: test fixture only

integrity: sha512-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA==
